flashcards.front: What is Dominant Strategy Incentive Compatibility (DSIC)?
flashcards.back: Dominant Strategy Incentive Compatibility (DSIC) is a fundamental concept in game-theory.

flashcards.front: Why is Dominant Strategy Incentive Compatibility (DSIC) important?
flashcards.back: Dominant Strategy Incentive Compatibility (DSIC) is essential for understanding Mechanism Design.
